name: Kennedy Energy Park - Phase 1 - Wind
notable: CF may be inflated. Hybrid facility (wind 43 MW + solar 15 MW + battery 2 MW) — OpenElectricity reports 49.5% CF for 2024 but Rystad Energy reports 42.4% AC CF. Discrepancy likely due to energy attribution between co-located DUIDs. Windlab confirms Kennedy ranked #2 in NEM behind Coonooer Bridge (~45%), inconsistent with 49.5%.

timeline.title: Construction commenced
timeline.detail: Windlab/Eurus hybrid project near Hughenden QLD

timeline.title: Commercial operations commenced
timeline.detail: Commencement date from AEMO registration via OpenElectricity.

timeline.title: First generation recorded
